summary: Motivated software developer with experience in building scalable web applications and a passion for clean code. Proven ability to work in agile teams and deliver high-quality solutions.

experience.title: Software Developer
bullets: Developed and maintained multiple web applications serving 10,000+ daily users
Reduced API response time by 40% through optimization and caching strategies
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver features on schedule
Implemented automated testing, increasing code coverage from 60% to 85%

experience.title: Junior Developer
bullets: Built responsive front-end interfaces using React and TypeScript
Integrated third-party APIs for payment processing and analytics
Participated in code reviews and mentored interns
Contributed to architecture decisions for microservices migration

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
